title: Palace of Westminster (Houses of Parliament)
description: This quiz is for the video Charles Barry and A.W.N. Pugin, Palace of Westminster.

assessment_items.question_content:
**The Gothic elements of  the Houses of Parliament are based on the perpendicular style of the Chapel of Henry VII at Westminster Abbey, which emphasize [[☃ dropdown 1]] and [[☃ dropdown 2]]. **

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/01dd237f2a540da2969ce589e22f07bd.png)
hints: **The Gothic elements are based on the perpendicular style of the Chapel of Henry VII at Westminster Abbey which emphasize verticality and elaborate tracery.**

assessment_items.question_content:
**The Houses of Parliament are [[☃ dropdown 1]] in the balance and rhythm of the facade. Its [[☃ dropdown 2]] appearance is based more on decorative features.** 


![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/01dd237f2a540da2969ce589e22f07bd.png)
hints: **The building is classical in the balance and rhythm of the facade. Its Gothic appearance is based more on decorative features.**

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which architectural style refers to efforts in the 19th century to revive architectural forms as a symbol of the beauty and tradition of the past and also describes the Houses of Parliament?**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/01dd237f2a540da2969ce589e22f07bd.png)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: **The building's style is called Gothic Revival, referring to the 19th century to revive historical architectural forms as a symbol of the beauty and tradition of the past.**

assessment_items.question_content:
**The Houses of Parliament is in part an expression of Victorian England's rejection of the apparent ugliness and greed of the  [[☃ dropdown 1]] and an embracing of what they saw as the [[☃ dropdown 2]] values of faith and individual craftsmanship.**  


![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/01dd237f2a540da2969ce589e22f07bd.png)
hints: **The Houses of Parliament is in part an expression of Victorian England's rejection of the apparent ugliness and greed of the modern era and an embracing of what they saw as the medieval values of faith and individual craftsmanship.**
